entries.round: task:Execute Phase 4, Part 1 from tasks.md: Connect Frontend to MongoDB. 1. Re-implement 'src/app/page.tsx' to fetch recent articles via Mongoose instead of Sanity. 2. Re-implement 'src/app/[category]/page.tsx' to fetch articles by category via Mongoose. 3. Re-implement 'src/app/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx' to fetch article detail by slug via Mongoose. Ensure proper lean() and JSON serialization. Ensure 'Article' and 'Category' models match the new taxonomy (news, markets, web3-defi, tutorials, reviews). Update tasks.md to check off these items.
